name: low-value-follow-up-skip
scenario: The user asks a short follow-up that does not add durable source-grounded content.

input.selectedText: A remembered event is not a sealed artifact; it is a rehearsal shaped by the present question.
input.assistantAnswer: 它的意思是：记忆会被你现在关心什么影响，不是原封不动地取出来。

decision.reason: short follow-up restates an existing explanation
